req.title: Message to provider (audit)
req.statement: A patient shall send a message to their provider; messages containing attachments shall scan for disallowed PHI exfiltration patterns. An AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation and tested end-to-end.

telemetry.raw_response_head:
```python
"""
pytest tests for patient-to-provider messaging with PHI exfiltration scanning
and AuditEvent emission requirements.

Requirements covered:
1. A patient can send a message to their provider.
2. Messages with attachments are scanned for disallowed PHI exfiltration patterns.
3. An AuditEvent is emitted for every operation.
4. All behaviors are tested end-to-end.
"""

import io
import json
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from typing import Any
from unittest.mock import AsyncMock, MagicMock, Mock, call, patch

import pytest

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models (lightweight stubs – replace with real imports)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class Message:
    def __init__(
        self,
        message_id: str,
        patient_id: str,
        provider_id: str,
        body: str,
        attachments: list[dict] | None = None,
    ):
        self.message_id = message_id
        self.patient_id = patient_id
        self.provider_id = provider_id
        self.body = body
        self.attachments = attachments or []
        self.created_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
        self.status = "pending"


class AuditEvent:
    def __init__(
        self,
        event_id: str,
        action: str,
        actor_id: str,
        resource_type: str,
        resource_id: str,
        outcome: str,  # "success" | "failure" | "blocked"
        metadata: dict | None = None,
        timestamp: datetime | None = None,
    ):
        self.event_id = event_id
        self.action = action
        self.actor_id = actor_id
        self.resource_type = resource_type
        self.resource_id = resource_id
        self.outcome = outcome
        self.metadata = metadata or {}
        self.timestamp = timestamp or datetime.now(timezone.utc)


class PHIExfiltrationError(Exception):
    """Raised when disallowed PHI patterns are detected."""
    def __init__(self, patterns_found: list[str]):
        self.patterns_found = patterns_found
        super().__init__(f"Disallowed PHI patterns detected: {patterns_found}")


class MessageDeliveryError(Exception):
    """Raised when message delivery fails."""


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Service interfaces (stubs – replace with real imports)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class PHIScannerService:
    """Scans content for disallowed PHI exfiltration patterns."""

    DISALLOWED_PATTERNS = [
        r"\b\d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4}\b",          # SSN
        r"\b\d{10,}\b",                      # long numeric strings (MRN, etc.)
        r"\b[A-Z]{1,2}\d{6,8}\b",            # insurance IDs
        r"(?i)date.of.birth\s*[:=]\s*\d",    # explicit DOB label
        r"(?i)diagnosis\s*[:=]\s*[A-Z]",     # explicit diagnosis label
    ]

    def scan_text(self, text: str) -> list[str]:
        raise NotImplementedError

    def scan_attachment(self, filename: str, content: bytes) -> list[str]:
        raise NotImplementedError


class AuditRepository:
    def save(self, event: AuditEvent) -> None:
        raise NotImplementedError

    def find_by_resource(self, resource_id: str) -> list[AuditEvent]:
        raise NotImplementedError

    def find_by_actor(self, actor_id: str) -> list[AuditEvent]:
        raise NotImplementedError


class MessageRepository:
    def save(self, message: Message) -> None:
        raise NotImplementedError

    def find_by_id(self, message_id: str) -> Message | None:
        raise NotImplementedError

    def find_by_patient(self, patient_id: str) -> list[Message]:
        raise NotImplementedError


class NotificationService:
    def notify_provider(self, provider_id: str, message: Message) -> None:
        raise NotImplementedError
